A strong CV needs to show you have shipped production LLM systems, not just experimented with models. It should demonstrate scale, reliability, evaluation discipline, and the ability to turn AI work into something usable by security or other high-stakes users.

It also needs evidence of technical leadership across teams, especially where explainability, guardrails, and fault-tolerant architecture matter.
